atlas v0.9
返回网页家族 / Back To Families

网页家族 / Contemporary Web Family

策展目录索引型 Curated Reference Directory

以索引、缩略图和分类入口为核心的参考目录型页面，先让用户浏览，再让用户钻取。

历史源头 / Historical Roots

瑞士风格 / Swiss Style后现代 / 孟菲斯 / Postmodern / Memphis

适配结构 / Structure Fit

目录索引型 / Catalog Explorer关系网络型 / Network Graph / Cluster

真实样本 / Sample Gallery

真实网站样本 / Live Website Samples

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

借法 / Interpretation

借这条家族的语法，不只模仿表面 / Borrow the grammar, not only the surface

识别特征 / Signature

  • scan-first cards
  • taxonomy near the top
  • thumbnail density
  • index-detail split

可借语法 / Borrow

  • visible browse and filter paths
  • directory framing
  • high sample density without losing scannability

适合内容 / Best For

  • reference atlases
  • template libraries
  • inspiration directories
  • collection sites

不适合时机 / Avoid When

  • a strong single narrative matters most
  • there are too few entries to justify a directory

页面模式 / Page Patterns

这条家族常见会长成哪些页面组织 / The page patterns this family commonly becomes

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

缩略图目录墙型 Thumbnail Directory Wall

A dense but legible sample field where thumbnails do the recruitment work and labels keep the browsing useful.

识别信号 / Cues

many visible thumbnailscategory labels near the topquick scan into detail

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

元数据网格索引型 Metadata Grid Index

The page behaves like an index: visible tags, stable card metadata, and strong typographic alignment do most of the organizing work.

识别信号 / Cues

grid-first listingmetadata as navigationstrong alignment

历史源头 / Historical Roots

这类网页常从哪些历史流派长出来 / The earlier lineages behind this kind of site

1950s-1970s

Switzerland

瑞士风格 Swiss Style

如果你想做可扫描、可扩展、可归档的知识系统，Swiss 比“简单好看”更重要。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

瑞士排印网格型 / Swiss Typographic Grid黑白工作室系统型 / Monochrome Studio Systems证据密集知识型 / Evidence-Dense Knowledge Surface
查看流派 / Open Movement

1981-1988 and beyond

Italy

后现代 / 孟菲斯 Postmodern / Memphis

今天很多 playful product、creator brand 和 anti-template 网站，会借 Memphis 的反网格情绪来打破模板感。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

后现代反网格型 / Playful Postmodern / Anti-Grid策展目录索引型 / Curated Reference Directory
查看流派 / Open Movement

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格包 / A ready-to-use prompt packet

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

策展目录索引型 Curated Reference Directory

Use a curated reference directory family: category-forward browsing, visible filters, dense but breathable thumbnails, and a clear separation between index and detail pages.

参考链接 / Reference Packet

继续打开真实站点看细节 / Open the live references

  • SiteInspire
  • Behance
  • Godly

给用 AI 做站的人：历史线索、页面感觉、结构模式、建站场景与真实参考 / For AI site builders: movements, page families, structure patterns, use cases, and live references
